zh.lifeSummary: 當Amphilbis De Longford於1395年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，她的父親Sir Nicholas de Longford IV24歲，母親Joan Warren16歲。她於1414年與Robert Lawrence在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在英國藍卡爾艾希頓 霍爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amphilbis De Longford于1395年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas de Longford IV24岁，母亲Joan Warren16岁。她于1414年与Robert Lawrence在英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在英国藍卡爾艾希頓 霍爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Langford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

en.lifeSummary: When Amphilbis De Longford was born in 1395, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Nicholas de Longford IV, was 24 and her mother, Joan Warren, was 16. She married Robert Lawrence in 1414, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1450, in Ashton Hall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amphilbis De Longford est née en 1395, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas de Longford IV, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Warren, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Lawrence en 1414, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Ashton Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amphilbis De Longford 1395 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas de Longford IV 24 und ihre Mutter Joan Warren 16. Sie hat 1414 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Robert Lawrence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Ashton Hall, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amphilbis De Longford è nata il nel 1395 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas de Longford IV, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan Warren, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Robert Lawrence nel 1414, nel Lancaster, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel Ashton Hall, Lancashire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amphilbis De Longfordが1395年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas de Longford IVは24歳，母Joan Warrenは16歳であった。1414年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターでRobert Lawrenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年にイギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン ハルで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amphilbis De Longford(이)가 1395년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas de Longford IV(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Warren(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 Robert Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 랭카실르 애슈턴 홀에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amphilbis De Longford nasceu em 1395, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas de Longford IV, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Warren, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Lawrence em 1414, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Ashton Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amphilbis De Longford родилась в 1395 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas de Longford IV было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Warren, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Lawrence в 1414 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности аштон холл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amphilbis De Longford nació en 1395, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas de Longford IV, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Warren, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Robert Lawrence en 1414, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1450, en Ashton Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
